name: inject-context
summary: On every user prompt, inject date, branch, and uncommitted-file count as stderr context. Cheap and always-on.
when_to_use: Long sessions where git state matters. Skip for purely non-git workflows.
script:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
I=$(head -c 65536)
CTX="[Context] Date: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')"
B=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo '')
[ -n "$B" ] && CTX="$CTX | Branch: $B"
U=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ' || echo 0)
CTX="$CTX | Uncommitted: $U files"
echo "$CTX" >&2
echo '{"decision":"approve"}'
verify: Submit any prompt; confirm [Context] line in stderr.
